final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire D,
    input wire WL,
    output reg BL
);
    reg unused_stored_value;

    always @(posedge WL) begin
        unused_stored_value <= D;  // Store the value when WL is high
    end

    always @(negedge WL) begin
        BL <= unused_stored_value;  // Output the stored value when WL is low
    end
endmodule
